customFields.title: Custom Fields
customFields.description: Manage your custom fields and configurations

packs.title: Gacha Packs
packs.subtitle: Create and manage gacha packs — listing details, status, and prize pools. Open a pack to edit its prize pool and win rates.

form.subtitle: Sets the pack's storefront listing. A new pack starts with an empty prize pool — open it afterwards to add cards.
form.slugHint: Unique, lowercase, kebab-case. Permanent — it keys the pack and its /claw URL.
form.buybackHint: "Sell on the spot" rate during the 30s keep/sell countdown at the reveal: this % of the card's market value as site credit. Must be at least the flat rate (90) — vaulted cards always sell back at flat 90%.
form.boostHint: Flags the pack as boosted/featured on the storefront.
form.poolHint: After creating, open the pack to add cards to its prize pool.

delete.title: Delete pack?
delete.description: This permanently removes "{{title}}" and its prize-pool membership. Cards and past pulls are kept. This cannot be undone.

pool.title: Prize pool
pool.subtitle: Pick the cards in this pack. {{count}} selected. New cards join as Common — set their rarity and win rates below after saving.
pool.loadError: Could not load the card catalog.
pool.noCards: No cards registered yet. Register inventory products as gacha cards first.

editor.title: Win rates
editor.subtitle: Pick each card's rarity for THIS pack — the same card can be a different tier in other packs. Unlocked cards split the remainder by rarity (Legendary rarest); lock a card to pin an exact win rate instead. These weights are secret — customers never see them.
editor.flattenWarning: No cards are locked — saving will reset every card to its rarity-based share. Lock the cards whose exact win rate you want to preserve first.

pcAdd.title: Add from PriceCharting
pcAdd.subtitle: Search PriceCharting, pick a graded tier, and create a marketplace product carrying that live-price link. Cards registered from this product auto-track its value daily.

grade.label: Grade tier
grade.loadError: Could not load prices for this product.
grade.empty: No prices available for this product.

stock.label: Stock quantity
stock.hint: Physical copies you hold. Decrements as the card is pulled or sold. Default 1 for a single graded slab.

preview.line: Raw ${{raw}} · FX {{fx}} · Market RM{{market}} · Customer sees RM{{customer}} · Margin RM{{margin}}

image.label: Image
image.hint: Required before the product can be created. PriceCharting does not provide an image — upload one.

cards.title: Gacha Cards
cards.subtitle: Inventory products registered as gacha prizes. Add the item to the product catalog first, then register it here; rarity is chosen per pack in each pack's win-rate editor.

list.empty: No cards registered yet. Add one from the inventory to get started.

register.title: Add card from inventory
register.subtitle: Pick an existing inventory product and add the gacha facts. Name, image, and handle come from the product — create the product first if it is not listed.
register.noEligible: Every inventory product is already registered. Create a new product in the catalog first.
register.pcNoMatches: No PriceCharting matches — refine the search or enter the value manually.
register.pcNoPrices: No prices recorded for this product — enter the value manually.
register.pcHint: Pick a match, then click a grade price to fill the market value. Needs PRICECHARTING_API_TOKEN on the backend; manual entry always works.
register.rarityHint: Rarity is NOT set here — the same card can be a different tier per pack. Choose it when you add the card to a pack (Gacha Packs → pool & odds).

form.subtitle: Edits the gacha facts and the marketplace listing mirror (price + visibility).
form.uploadHint: Upload a file, or paste a storefront-relative path (e.g. /cdn/cards/x.webp).
form.name: Name
form.forSaleHint: When off, the card stays a pack prize but is hidden from the store.
form.markupHint: Display-only markup applied on top of the tracked PriceCharting value. 20 = show 20% above FMV.

toast.unlinked: Card unlinked from PriceCharting — now priced manually.
toast.deleted: Card removed from the gacha system.

delete.title: Remove card?
delete.description: This removes "{{name}}" from the gacha system and from every pack's prize pool. The inventory product and past pulls are kept. This cannot be undone.

pulls.title: Pull Ledger
pulls.subtitle: Every pack opened, the card won, and who pulled it.
pulls.loadError: Could not load the pull ledger.

support.title: Customer Support
support.subtitle: Look up a customer's credits, pulls, and vault — and apply credit adjustments.
support.adjustInvalid: Amount must be a number (e.g. 5 or -5).
support.adjustConfirmDescription: This will apply {{amount}} to {{email}}'s credit balance. The note is recorded in the ledger.

customer360.title: Customer 360
customer360.treeSubtitle: Direct recruits and their downline — up to 6 levels deep.
customer360.treeTruncated: Tree exceeds 1 000 nodes — showing the first 1 000. Open a subtree to explore deeper.
customer360.commissionsSubtitle: All commissions earned by this customer as a referral sponsor.
customer360.auditSubtitle: All freeze, unfreeze, credit adjustment, and commission actions on this account.
customer360.modalReasonPlaceholder: Required — recorded in the audit trail
customer360.modalFreezeDesc: The customer will be locked out. Enter a reason for the audit trail.
customer360.modalUnfreezeDesc: The customer will regain access. Enter a reason for the audit trail.
customer360.modalCreditsDesc: Apply a credit adjustment to this customer's balance. Amount and note are required.
customer360.modalReverseDesc: This permanently reverses the commission. Enter a reason for the audit trail.
customer360.modalSuspendDesc: The commission will be held. Enter a reason for the audit trail.
customer360.modalUnsuspendDesc: The commission will be released back to available. Enter a reason for the audit trail.

economy.title: Economy
economy.subtitle: Lifetime credit flows and what the vault still owes.
economy.rtpSubtitle: Expected payout per open from the current odds × card FMVs. Above 100% means the pack loses money.
economy.loadError: Could not load the economy report.
